data.body: Stack now 5 commits: a41f,b55f,319a,eba7,e205 (all committed w/ Change-Id+DCO+ticket trailer; hook lint+typecheck green on e205). e205 completeness grep empty, all stale bash language purged. Note: must source venv before git commit for .py changes (hook runs bare mypy/ruff). Next: 9d81 (re-review running after AC strengthen), then 6755, then code leaves f088/0435/e866/235a, then b5a4.
